infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AERIS needs camera access to take photos and videos for incident reports
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AERIS needs microphone access to record audio for emergency calls
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AERIS needs photo library access to upload evidence
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: AERIS needs to save photos and videos to your library
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: AERIS needs contacts access to set up emergency contacts
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AERIS needs your location to send emergency responders to you
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: AERIS needs background location to track ongoing emergencies
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: AERIS uses Face ID for secure app access
